scripts.build: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && next build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && next dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/core build && pnpm --filter @open-payments-devkit/fixtures build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
